title: Mesken Consulting
summary: Mesken Consulting supports students pursuing international education opportunities by connecting them with overseas institutions.
shortDescription: An educational consultancy platform focused on trust, clarity, and student conversion.

overview: Mesken Consulting supports students pursuing international education opportunities by connecting them with overseas institutions.
The platform needed to present educational consulting services with clarity and trust.
challenges: The experience needed to support student recruitment while keeping the content easy to understand.
The platform had to balance trust, clarity, and conversion.
approach: Structured the experience around clear service information.
Built responsive layouts for students browsing across devices.
Presented international education content in a direct and approachable format.
outcome: The final platform communicates Mesken Consulting's education services with a focus on trust, clarity, and student conversion.
caseStudy.pullQuote: For education consulting, clarity is part of the product experience.
